title: SlotKeeper
description: Purchase inventory slots with xp to keep items after death.
body:
### Overview:
Players can spend **experience points** to purchase the ability to protect an individual inventory or armor slot, which will ensure that the items in those slots are preserved after death. Players can select which slots will be protected, whether one of the **36 main inventory slots**, one of the **armor slots** _(Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)_, the **off-hand** _(OffHand)_, or any combination of the above.

This system is designed to make the survival experience more strategic, as players must carefully consider how to spend their XP. They must also decide which items to ‘purchase’ slots for, since items in unprotected slots can still be lost on death, ensuring that losing unprotected items carries a risk.

### Command(s):

_/slotkeep_ – opens the SlotKeeping menu, showing all available and purchased slots. Players can click on a slot in the menu to buy it directly using XP.

### Please note: 
This plugin was originally created for a private server, so updates may be limited, as the plugin is shared casually and maintenance priorities are low.
